title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
